title: Guidonia fragilis
taxonomy: Guidonia fragilis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is part of the order Gentianales and is native to certain regions. Within the Apocynaceae family, Guidonia fragilis is classified as a member of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. Further, it belongs to the tribe Plumerieae and shares characteristics with other plants in this group. The classification of Guidonia fragilis highlights its unique position among other flowering plant species.
